profileFilter.description: Optional. Narrow results to edges whose `profiles[]` intersect this set. Edges with `profiles=null` (single-profile back-compat) pass every filter. INV-MULTI-DEFINE-WIRE-001.

groupBy.description: Optional grouping mode for the dependency endpoints. 'bucket' = Production/Test/Editor/Generated/Vendored; 'module' = per-module/asmdef counts; 'both' = both; 'none' (default) = legacy flat shape with no extra keys. Grouped mode is a SUMMARY — it omits the full flat dependencies[] array (the per-group previews are the payload; use filters/includeBuckets for a bounded flat list), staying overflow-safe on hub types. INV-EDGE-GROUP-001.

excludeTests.description: Drop edges whose endpoint classifies to the Test bucket (default false). Narrows the flat list AND the grouped view.

excludeGenerated.description: Drop edges whose endpoint classifies to the Generated bucket (default false).

includeBuckets.description: Optional allowlist of endpoint buckets to keep (case-insensitive): Production / Test / Editor / Generated / Vendored. Empty / omitted = all buckets.

previewPerGroup.description: Cap on preview endpoint-ids per bucket/module when `groupBy` is set. 0 = counts only. Default: 5.
